programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Opening Ceremonies; Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Adventure Bay Games
programs.desc: Marshall leads the pups when an underground fire threatens the Opening Ceremonies in this Ultimate Fire Rescue; Chase and his police-pups must find the missing medals to save the Adventure Bay Games in this Ultimate Police Rescue.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.sub_title: The Grill Is Gone; The Night Patty
programs.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back; SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.desc: SpongeBob volunteers to baby-sit; SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick have their peaceful day of jelly fishing disturbed by Sandy's competitive nature; SpongeBob pulls from Squidward's shirt a loose string that never seems to end.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.desc: Patrick discovers that the rock he lives under is actually a sea turtle that overslept; old Man Jenkins disrupts business as usual at the Krusty Krab, but Mr. Krabs can't find a way to kick him out.

programs.title: The Patrick Star Show
programs.sub_title: The Patterfly Effect; A Space Affair to Remember
programs.desc: Patrick messes with the space-time continuum; while Cecil and Bunny celebrate their anniversary in outer space, Patrick and Squidina throw a house party.
